basic_details.job_title: CCRS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Social Worker, Upper Division Clerk and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Central Council for Research in Siddha (CCRS)
basic_details.post_name: Social Worker, Upper Division Clerk and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central Council for Research in Siddha (CCRS) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 11 July 2026 on the official website ccrs.ayush.gov.in. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the CCRS Social Worker, Upper Division Clerk (UDC), and Lower Division Clerk (LDC) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: Relaxable for Government servants upto 5 years in accordance with the instructions or orders issued by the Central Government; PwBD as admissible.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree, Diploma in Social work, Post-graduate degree in Sociology, 12th Class or equivalent, Typing speed
qualification.details: Social Worker: Degree from a recognized University; Diploma in Social work of minimum one year duration from a recognized University/Institution and One year experience in Social work in a recognized Institution/Hospital OR Post-graduate degree in Sociology from a recognized University. Upper Division Clerk (UDC): Degree of a recognized University or equivalent; At least three years experience in correspondence work in Govt./Semi Govt./Public Sector Undertakings/Autonomous Bodies/Institutions; Thorough knowledge of office routine/rules and regulations. Lower Division Clerk (LDC): 12th Class or equivalent qualification from a recognized Board or University; Typing speed of 35 w.p.m. in English or 30 w.p.m. in Hindi or Tamil on Computer.

selection_process: Written Test Skill Test (for LDC) Personal Interview (if applicable) Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CCRS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://ccrs.ayush.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-09-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.central_council_for_research_in_siddha_c: Social Worker, Upper Division Clerk and More Posts
Degree, Diploma in Social work, Post-graduate degree in Sociology, 12th Class or equivalent, Typing speed

content_sections.heading: CCRS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CCRS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CCRS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CCRS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Social Worker: Degree from a recognized University; Diploma in Social work of minimum one year duration from a recognized University/Institution and One year experience in Social work in a recognized Institution/Hospital OR Post-graduate degree in Sociology from a recognized University. Upper Division Clerk (UDC): Degree of a recognized University or equivalent; At least three years experience in correspondence work in Govt./Semi Govt./Public Sector Undertakings/Autonomous Bodies/Institutions; Thorough knowledge of office routine/rules and regulations. Lower Division Clerk (LDC): 12th Class or equivalent qualification from a recognized Board or University; Typing speed of 35 w.p.m. in English or 30 w.p.m. in Hindi or Tamil on Computer.

content_sections.heading: CCRS Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: Relaxable for Government servants upto 5 years in accordance with the instructions or orders issued by the Central Government; PwBD as admissible.

content_sections.heading: CCRS Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test Skill Test (for LDC) Personal Interview (if applicable) Document Verification Merit List

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CCRS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://ccrs.ayush.gov.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-09-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CCRS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for CCRS Recruitment 2026 is 09 September 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in CCRS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for the posts of Social Worker, Upper Division Clerk, and Lower Division Clerk in the Central Council for Research in Siddha.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all the posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 300/-. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for CCRS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for CCRS Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary by post, including a Degree, Diploma in Social Work, Post-graduate degree in Sociology, or 12th Class with specific typing speed requirements.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 19,900 to Rs. 1,12,400 per month, depending on the post and pay matrix level.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for CCRS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process typically includes a Written Test, Skill Test (for LDC), Personal Interview, Document Verification, and Merit List preparation.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of CCRS: https://ccrs.ayush.gov.in/.

faq.question: Q10. Does CCRS offer any age relaxation?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for Government servants up to 5 years and for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) as per Central Government instructions.
